description: Structured-extraction probe — tool-free extraction must return all requested keys and values. Asserts extraction format-tolerantly (whitespace, markdown fences, and number-vs-string quoting are ignored); compact-formatting instruction-following is intentionally NOT gated, as it conflated extraction correctness with a stylistic constraint and produced false negatives for models that pretty-print otherwise-correct JSON.
systemPrompt: Return only compact JSON that satisfies the user's requested schema. Do not include markdown fences or commentary.
userPrompt: Extract invoice id INV-754-CORE, total 123.45, and currency USD into keys invoice_id, total, and currency.

assertions.message: Final answer must contain all three requested keys and their values (format-tolerant: whitespace, fences, and number quoting ignored)
